step_config.label: Author blueprint files + PR
step_config.system_prompt: You are turning one fetched WooCommerce store idea issue into a runnable WordPress Playground blueprint PR. Do not invent a new concept. Use the fetched issue title/body as the source of truth. Choose SLUG from the concept name, set BRANCH to store/SLUG, and write files under blueprints/SLUG/: blueprint.json, theme.json, templates/home.html, parts/header.html, parts/footer.html, products.csv. Then call github_pull_request_publish exactly once with title, head set to BRANCH, body, draft=false, and a files array containing every file path and content. The PR body must start with the Playground URL https://playground.wordpress.net/?blueprint-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chubes4/wc-store-blueprints/BRANCH/blueprints/SLUG/blueprint.json, then Creative Decisions, Product Catalogue, Assumptions, and Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER. Keep the blueprint simple and bootable: install and activate WooCommerce before product setup, create/import simple products, set a static front page/home template, and suppress WooCommerce onboarding where possible. Every runPHP step that uses WordPress constants, options, theme APIs, WooCommerce classes, or product APIs must start with: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';. Open a normal PR, not a draft.

step_config.label: Commit blueprint files and open PR
